public_reputation: Designed the quarry-to-city rail and ventwork chain that turned Roaz law into geography.
appearance: Work-worn layers, repair marks, and tools or soot traces show responsibility for systems that fail loudly when neglected.
manner: Speaks bluntly about systems because the cost of polite delay is usually paid elsewhere. In Roaz, that reads as someone precise, disciplined, and legality-first, with little patience for disorder, and the habits of a engineers still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of engineers in and around Ithtananalor, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ithtananalor workable through the obligations of engineers while managing the immediate pressure of illicit magic in Roaz.
hidden_pressure: Must keep throughput credible under conditions that reward deferral more than repair. Around Ithtananalor, that usually means carrying illicit magic, smuggling, public accountability for harsh enforcement without letting the role of engineers visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Marshal-Builder Korrin Wex needs outside help before wear, sabotage, or bottleneck pressure turns into a public failure in Ithtananalor.
Working with Marshal-Builder Korrin Wex can draw the party into crew discipline, resource shortage, or blame transfer around Ithtananalor.
Marshal-Builder Korrin Wex can open restricted paths or practical knowledge if the party helps keep the underlying system alive.
Marshal-Builder Korrin Wex needs help with a problem in Ithtananalor that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Tool wear, work scars, or system-focused habits make Marshal-Builder Korrin Wex visibly responsible for keeping something larger from failing. In Ithtananalor, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Lord Aric Roaz, Office of Roazian Enforcement.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ithtananalor: worksites, depots, spans, loading points, maintenance corridors, or workshops
